title: ttyd-tmux-cf: Persistent web terminal gated by Cloudflare Zero Trust
description: A reproducible runbook to deploy a persistent web terminal (ttyd + tmux) on macOS, gated by Cloudflare Zero Trust (email OTP) with Nerd Font glyphs served from Cloudflare R2. Designed for single-prompt automated setup via Claude Code, while remaining a readable runbook for manual execution.
